ensembles.name: North Carolina congressional ensemble (ALARM 50-State Simulations)
ensembles.source: ALARM Project, 50-State Redistricting Simulations (Harvard Dataverse, CC0)
ensembles.description: Real NC congressional ensemble (5,000 redist SMC plans) normalized from ALARM's published per-district statistics under the 2020 presidential proxy.
caveats: DRAFT: distributions are computed from ALARM's published statistics, but the payload stays draft until the consistency checks are expert-reviewed. Percentiles are only meaningful relative to the documented constraint set.
The seat and share measures use the 2020 presidential proxy (pre_20), not ALARM's e_dem/pr_dem multi-election composites and not congressional election results.

The reference plan (NC 2022 court plan) equals ALARM's cd_2020 reference and is scored from ALARM's exact per-district vote totals (assignment: exact_alarm_reference). The other compared plans are not in ALARM's ensemble and are scored by Honeycombing from VEST 2020 precinct-centroid assignment (descriptive_with_assignment_caveat). The reference calibration bounds the district-level error of that shortcut at 0.12pp; every compared plan's Democratic-seat count clears that bound — its closest-district margin is reported in seatMarginPp.

The ensemble was simulated for the 2020 redistricting cycle with the 2022 ratified congressional map as its reference plan. Percentile positions describe where a plan sits in this simulated distribution; they are not evidence of intent or legal injury.

The district-level unit measure (ranked_dem_share_pre20) ranks the districts of the 2025 enacted plan (SL 2025-95, the map in force for 2026); the superseded 2023 plan appears in comparedPlans only. District rank assignments inherit the centroid-assignment calibration bound; districts 3706 and 3710; 3710 and 3714; 3707 and 3711 differ by less than that bound, so their ranks (and unit percentiles) could swap under exact assignment.

The H3 cell-level measure (divergence localization) is generated separately by scripts/build-ensemble-h3-localization.py from ALARM's extracted plan-assignment matrices and shipped as a lazy-loaded sidecar (nc-congress-2020-alarm-h3.json, referenced by the registry's h3LocalizationUrl). It projects the CONTAINING DISTRICT's 2020-presidential lean onto each cell versus the neutral distribution — a spatial marker of where the enacted 2025 map departs from the ensemble, never a claim about the cell residents' own vote or representation.

ensembles.name: North Carolina congressional ensemble summary (MOCK)
ensembles.description: Mocked NC congressional ensemble summary that validates the ensemble explainer schema end-to-end.
caveats: MOCK PAYLOAD: every number below is fabricated to exercise the schema and UI. It is not an ensemble analysis of North Carolina and must never be cited or displayed as evidence.
